Legal

Terms & Conditions

Please read these terms carefully before using FirstTechHub services.

1. Agreement to Terms

By accessing and using FirstTechHub ("the Platform"), you agree to be bound by these Terms & Conditions. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you must not use our services.

2. User Eligibility

You must be at least 13 years old to use FirstTechHub. If you are under 18, you must have parental or guardian consent. Parents and guardians are responsible for monitoring their child's use of the Platform.

3. Account Registration

You agree to provide accurate, current, and complete information during registration. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your password and for all activities occurring under your account. You agree to notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.

4. User Conduct

You agree not to:

  • Use the Platform for illegal purposes or in violation of applicable laws
  • Harass, threaten, or abuse other users
  • Transmit malware, viruses, or any code of destructive nature
  • Engage in unauthorized access or data theft
  • Spam or send unsolicited communications
  • Interfere with the Platform's operation or security
  • Reproduce, duplicate, or distribute content without permission

5. Intellectual Property Rights

All content on FirstTechHub, including but not limited to courses, materials, images, text, and code, is the intellectual property of FirstTechHub or its content providers. You may not copy, modify, or distribute this content without explicit written permission.

6. Educational Content Disclaimer

FirstTechHub provides educational training and resources on a "as-is" basis. While we strive for accuracy, we do not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or usefulness of any information provided. Learning outcomes may vary based on individual effort and engagement.

7. Limitation of Liability

To the fullest extent permitted by law, FirstTechHub shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use or inability to use the Platform, even if we have been advised of the possibility of such damages.

8. Payments and Refunds

Paid courses and services are non-refundable except as required by law. By making a purchase, you agree to pay the stated fees. FirstTechHub reserves the right to change pricing with notice. Refund requests must be submitted within 7 days of purchase if applicable.

9. Termination of Service

FirstTechHub reserves the right to suspend or terminate your account at any time for violation of these terms or for any reason at our discretion. Upon termination, your access to courses and services will be immediately revoked.

10. Modifications to Terms

FirstTechHub may modify these Terms & Conditions at any time. Changes will be effective immediately upon posting to the Platform. Your continued use constitutes acceptance of the modified terms.

11. Dispute Resolution

Any disputes arising from these terms or your use of the Platform shall be governed by the laws of the jurisdiction where FirstTechHub operates. You agree to submit to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts in that location.

12. Contact Information

For questions or concerns regarding these Terms & Conditions, please contact us at:

Email: support@firsttechhub.com

Address: FirstTechHub, [Your Address]

Last Updated: May 2026
